title: Meta Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Highlights
text: Meta reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $59.9 billion, up 24% year over year, and full-year 2025 revenue of $201.0 billion, up 22%. Fourth-quarter net income was $22.8 billion, up 9%, and diluted EPS was $8.88, up 11%. Full-year net income was $60.5 billion, down 3%, partly affected by tax impacts, while full-year diluted EPS was $23.49. Meta reported 3.58 billion Family daily active people on average for December 2025, up 7% year over year. Advertising remained the core revenue driver, with ad impressions across the Family of Apps rising 18% in Q4 and 12% for the full year, while average price per ad increased 6% in Q4 and 9% for the full year. Meta generated $115.8 billion of operating cash flow and $43.6 billion of free cash flow in 2025. Management guided for Q1 2026 revenue of $53.5 billion to $56.5 billion and expected higher 2026 expenses driven mainly by AI infrastructure and technical talent.
